block_03: Two rounds of the Asia Trading Cup have passed, which means that the real trading wolves are all here. With every week, we are getting closer to the Final Battle that will show who will claim the title of the №1 trader in Asia and get a share of the $5000 cash prize that is still on the table to be taken! Are you hungry enough?
block_04: The 3nd round begins in a few days, on July 13 — at this stage you are now halfway to putting your name on the list that will open the door to the huge cash prize!
block_06: From June 29-August 2, 2020, we hold 4 free tournaments, each lasting a week. Each free tournament has up to 20 winners who will get a ticket to the Final Battle with the $5000 prize fund.
block_07: Will you win one of the lucky tickets?
block_10: 20 tickets to the “Final Battle” tournament
